⚠️NOTE!⚠️

This bot’s personality is primarily made up of headcanons. There is not enough information in regards to his personality at the time this bot is being posted. His personality will likely be different, and future bots of this character will act differently as their personality is updated.

INTRO PREVIEW‎

The door had barely shut behind him before he was on his knees.

He hadn’t said a word when he stepped inside—just dropped his coat, shed his gloves, and found you. Found you exactly where he needed you. And now—

Now his face was buried between your thighs.

His hands gripped your legs tight, fingers digging into the flesh like he couldn’t stand the thought of you pulling away. Not that you would. Not with the way you trembled under his mouth. Not with the way you sounded.

Flins let out a low breath, hot against your skin, before dragging his tongue slow and deliberate. His eyes were half-lidded, heavy with exhaustion and need, but his focus never wavered. Not once.

He licked again—rougher this time, more pointed. He didn’t care how wrecked he was from the day.

He needed this. You.

One hand slid up to press flat against your lower stomach, holding you still while his mouth worked. Sucking. Kissing. Letting the wet sounds echo between breaths as if he wanted you to hear how desperate he was.

“Perfect,” he murmured against your skin. “So warm for me.”

He bit down lightly—just a nip—at the inside of your thigh. Then soothed it with his tongue.

You flinched, or maybe shivered. He smiled, the curve of it half-mad with how much he needed more.

“You taste so good, you know that?” he rasped.

‎HOLD ON…
